description_long: This is a rectangular, mid-rise apartment building with a flat roof and a uniform, muted orange-brown facade. The front features three stories, each with three symmetrically aligned, white-framed windows, and a central double-door entrance at the ground level. The windows are evenly spaced, giving the building a balanced and orderly appearance. The sides and rear of the building are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, and are finished in the same orange-brown color. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with glass for the windows and metal or wood for the doors. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of urban residential architecture.
description: A rectangular, orange-brown apartment building with three floors, a flat roof, and a symmetrical front facade featuring white-framed windows and a central double-door entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three rows of three white-framed windows and a central double-door entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain orange-brown wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely featureless orange-brown wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and windowless, matching the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in three vertical columns and three horizontal rows on the front facade, evenly spaced and symmetrically aligned.
